programme.title: S1E2 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Join “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson and a fearless team of conservationists on an epic mission to protect the planet’s most majestic and endangered predators. From rescuing lions at the Kevin Richardson Wildlife Sanctuary in South Africa to safeguarding orangutans and Cape Griffons in the wilds of Indonesia, witness heart-pounding rescues, fierce battles against exploitation, and inspiring stories of survival. This is conservation at its most daring—unmissable, unforgettable, and truly wild.

programme.title: S2E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: From polar bears to roaring lions—this is GoPro Adventures at its wildest. Dive into jaw-dropping encounters with lions, whales, turtles, giraffes, and watch “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson at his South African sanctuary, where rescued predators find a second chance. It’s the ultimate fusion of wildlife wonder and high-octane thrills—you won’t be able to look away.

programme.title: S2E2 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Motorbikes, speed, and pure adrenaline—this is the ultimate GoPro adventure. Ride with Mexican enduro master Didier Goirand, push limits alongside British racing icon Maria Costello, the only female motorcycle racer ever to be awarded an MBE, and feel the thrill with American motorsports legend and DC Shoes founder Ken Block. High-octane action, world-class talent, and breathtaking moments—you won’t want to miss a second.

programme.title: S3E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: The GoPro production crew journeys to the Marum Crater on Ambrym Island in Vanuatu to join adventurer photographers Geoff Mackley and Bradley Ambrose, the first people to stand at the edge of a boiling lava lake and witness the raw lifeblood of our planet. The adventure continues with Dr. Ingrid Visser, who has dedicated her life and research to protecting the most intelligent predator in the ocean, the orca. She swims alongside wild orcas and champions modern solutions to free them from captivity. Experience never-before-seen footage captured by a GoPro mounted to the dorsal fin of a wild orca, along with rare archival material from the Orca Research Trust. This is exploration and conservation at its most powerful.

programme.title: S3E2 Adventure Series
programme.desc: The journey continues with Dr. Ingrid Visser, a marine pioneer devoted to protecting the ocean’s most intelligent predator, the orca. She swims with wild orcas and leads the charge for innovative solutions to end captivity. Witness never-before-seen footage captured by a GoPro mounted to the dorsal fin of a wild orca, paired with rare archival material from the Orca Research Trust. This is exploration and conservation at their most inspiring. In the wide-open skies and sweeping valleys of the Mustang Monument Wild Horse Eco-Resort & Sanctuary, more than 600 Wild American Mustangs roam free. Cowboy and family man Clay Nannini reveals the importance of preserving this symbol of American heritage while passing its legacy to his children. As night falls, Tokyo becomes an electrifying playground for those who crave speed and style. The city’s custom vehicle culture bursts to life, introducing unforgettable characters and rides unlike anything you have seen before. Lamborghinis, Hayabusas, RWB Porsches, and Kaido Racers create a visual feast on the streets of Tokyo after dark.

programme.desc: On the run after murdering a man, accountant William Blake encounters a strange Native American named Nobody.

programme.title: Solid Foundation
programme.desc: Prospector Jim Otis is taken hostage by robbers after he stumbles onto their loot.

programme.desc: In order to secure a loan from the bank, Grampa must sign title to the McCoy farm over to his grandson Luke.

programme.title: Once There Was a Traveling Saleswoman
programme.desc: Luke gets swindled into buying a swimming pool from a beautiful saleswoman.

programme.title: You Can't Cheat an Honest Man
programme.desc: The rest of the family thinks Grampa is taking advantage of a city fellow.

programme.title: Dodge City
programme.desc: A Texas cattleman comes to Dodge City, Kan., with his buddies and dons a badge to clean it up.

programme.title: Rocky Mountain
programme.desc: Rebel officer (Errol Flynn) uses Yankee bride (Patrice Wymore) as bait in Indian country.

programme.title: Zane Grey Theatre
programme.desc: A wife plots with her lover to kill her wealthy rancher husband.

programme.title: Zane Grey Theatre
programme.desc: People in a small Western town deal with the Civil War's legacy.

programme.title: Zane Grey Theatre
programme.desc: A cowhand moving a herd to market finds a lost boy.

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1 E7 - Lucas And A Rich Man Teach The Town Bully A Lesson
programme.desc: When a notorious and wealthy gunfighter arrives in North Fork, he intimidates the townspeople with his reputation and arrogance. Seeking to end the bully's reign of terror, Lucas McCain joins forces with an unlikely ally to humble the gunman and prove that intimidation cannot override the strength of a united community

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E20 The Wild Bunch of Wyoming
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark heads into the rugged Wyoming wilderness to track down the infamous Wild Bunch. Facing off against a highly organized gang of outlaws who know the terrain better than anyone, Clark must use all his wits to dismantle their stronghold and bring the gang to justice before they can pull off their next major heist

programme.title: Sundown Saunders Bob Steele 1935
programme.desc: After winning a high-stakes horse race, a cowboy is paid with the deed to a ranch, only to discover a family already living there after being scammed by a fraudulent land agent. When the crooked agent frames him for murder, he must evade the law to clear his name and protect the family from further ruin

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E17 Henry Plummer
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark travels to the Montana territory to investigate a wave of violent stagecoach robberies. He soon discovers that the crimes are being orchestrated by the local sheriff himself, forcing Clark into a dangerous showdown to expose Henry Plummer as the leader of the ruthless outlaws he was sworn to catch

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E6 Cattle Kate
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark travels to Wyoming to investigate the powerful and dangerous Ella Watson, known as "Cattle Kate." Clark must navigate local corruption and land disputes to build a case against her, ultimately aiming to put an end to her criminal activities and bring stability to the territory

programme.title: Tombstone Canyon 1932
programme.desc: In Tombstone Canyon, cowboy hero Ken Maynard rides into a lawless valley shrouded in mystery. A masked outlaw known only as ‘The Phantom’ terrorizes the land, leaving fear in his wake. With danger around every corner and secrets buried deep in the canyon’s shadows, Maynard must uncover the truth and bring justice to a town on the brink.

programme.title: Fistful of Lead
programme.desc: A wandering gunfighter plays two rival families against each other in a town torn apart by greed, pride, and revenge.

programme.title: Blindman 1971
programme.desc: In Blindman, Tony Anthony stars as a blind gunfighter hired to escort fifty mail-order brides across the desert. When a ruthless gang kidnaps the women, he must rely on his instincts, cunning, and deadly aim to bring them back. With Ringo Starr as a treacherous outlaw, this Spaghetti Western delivers gritty action, brutal showdowns, and a unique twist on the lone gunslinger legend.

programme.title: Dead for a Dollar
programme.desc: A famed bounty hunter runs into his sworn enemy, a professional gambler and outlaw that he had sent to prison years before.

programme.title: The Outlaw (1943) Colorized
programme.desc: Howard Hughes’ infamous Western The Outlaw blazes with passion, rivalry, and danger. When Billy the Kid (Jack Buetel) rides into town, he becomes entangled in a volatile triangle with gunslinger Doc Holliday (Walter Huston) and lawman Pat Garrett (Thomas Mitchell). But it’s the fiery beauty Rio (Jane Russell, in her breakout role) who sparks the most dangerous conflict of all. With smoldering romance, tense standoffs, and Hughes’ bold style, this legendary film pushed boundaries and made Hollywood history.
